title: Send perf requirements to graph agent

log.context: Send perf requirements to graph agent

There's no `SendMessage` tool available for communicating with running subagents. The Claude Code SDK doesn't support sending messages to already-running background agents mid-execution.

Here's the situation:

**Agent `a7e28a5ba88f99cee` is still running.** Based on the last 5 lines of its output, it's actively working on viewport culling optimizations in `/mnt/data/terminal/graph.html`.
